# AI Monitoring

Sentry provides comprehensive monitoring for your AI implementations. Whether you're building AI agents or MCP servers, Sentry automatically captures performance metrics, errors, and traces across your entire AI pipeline.

[![](https://docs.sentry.io/ai/img/IconBot.svg)](https://docs.sentry.io/ai/monitoring/agents.md)

### [AI Agent Monitoring](https://docs.sentry.io/ai/monitoring/agents.md)

[Monitor AI agent workflows including agent runs, tool calls, model interactions, and handoffs.](https://docs.sentry.io/ai/monitoring/agents.md)

[![](https://docs.sentry.io/ai/img/IconCompass.svg)](https://docs.sentry.io/ai/monitoring/conversations.md)

### [Conversations](https://docs.sentry.io/ai/monitoring/conversations.md)

[Replay past conversations with your AI assistants. See every message and tool call in a chat-like view.](https://docs.sentry.io/ai/monitoring/conversations.md)

[![](https://docs.sentry.io/ai/img/IconCode.svg)](https://docs.sentry.io/ai/monitoring/mcp.md)

### [MCP Monitoring](https://docs.sentry.io/ai/monitoring/mcp.md)

[Trace and debug your MCP server implementations. Monitor tool executions, resource access, and client connections.](https://docs.sentry.io/ai/monitoring/mcp.md)
